series_metadata.series_description: Versions of bills, supporting bill documents, such as bill analyses, fiscal notes, synopses, specialized budget bill descriptive documents, such as redbooks, comparison documents, budget in details), and public testimony kept by the LSC staff members who staffed the committee. Generally documents are preserved in two series: Bills (with testimony) and Analyses (the supporting bill documents), corresponding to each biennial session of the Ohio General Assembly.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: in LSC computer area four years; LSC Library Files keep another four years. Materials are be microfilmed, but beginning with 123rd General Assembly Bill Series, and beginning with 126th General Assembly, Analyses series, documents are scanned as tiff or pdf images. Check Microfilm or tiff images quality and completeness. 8 total years paper files may be disposed. ; Electronic: Machine readable documents related bill files shall be converted tiff or retained as pdf images and merged with appropriate series of scanned paper documents. Machine readable documents available librarian and related bill files are available from multiple sources and many are copies of paper documents in physical bill file that are saved a total of . machine readable copies available librarian may be erased upon completion of process create tiff or pdf images, proofing quality and completeness, and creation of DVD and an online archive on an LSC network drive. Maintain copy of tiff or pdf images in library on DVD and in an online archive on an LSC network drive; deposit a DVD of tiff or pdf images State Archives ; Microform: Maintain copy of microfilm in library; deposit original microfilm at State Archives
retention_rules.disposition_method: Paper: Wastepaper ; Electronic: Archives ; Microform: Archives
